title: homolog_index binary file format (.holindx)
description: Mmap-friendly flat binary written by homolog_index_build and read by homolog_index_query. All multi-byte integers and floats are little-endian. Structs are __attribute__((packed)) so byte offsets are exact (no padding). Layout: [Header][GeneRecord×n_genes][HitRecord×n_hits][string_pool].

fields_in_order.name: string_pool_size
fields_in_order.doc: Bytes in the string pool (after the hit array).

fields_in_order.name: off_gene_index
fields_in_order.doc: Byte offset of GeneRecord array from file start.

fields_in_order.name: reserved
fields_in_order.doc: Reserved for future use; zero in v1.

GeneRecord.ordering: Records are sorted alphabetically by gene name (strcmp on pool[name_off]).

fields_in_order.name: hits_off
fields_in_order.doc: Index (NOT byte offset) into the hit array; first hit for this gene.

HitRecord.ordering: Within a gene's hit range: sorted by bitscore descending, then identity descending.

fields_in_order.name: qstart
fields_in_order.doc: Query start coordinate as emitted by the source tool (DIAMOND: 1-based inclusive; miniprot PAF: 0-based half-open).

fields_in_order.name: bitscore
fields_in_order.doc: -1 if not available. miniprot: parsed from ms:i: or AS:i: tag if present.

fields_in_order.name: n_segments
fields_in_order.doc: 1 for DIAMOND; future: parsed from miniprot cs:Z: tag.

string_pool.doc: Concatenated NUL-terminated strings referenced by *_off fields. Offset 0 is reserved for the empty string.

lookup_algorithm: Binary-search the GeneRecord array by strcmp on string_pool[record.name_off]. Found → iterate hits[gene.hits_off .. gene.hits_off + gene.n_hits].
endianness_note: Builder and query both assume little-endian host (x86_64, aarch64 LE). Reading on big-endian hosts is not supported in v1.
